title: macrothelypteris keraudreniana
intro: Macrothelypteris keraudreniana, also known as the Keraudren's fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Macrothelypteris keraudreniana include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and improve skin health. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used as a paste or topical application for skin conditions.
